Name: Eternal Grudge
DevDescription: KO’s self. In return, halves the opponent's ATK and SpATK.

Name: Infernal Flame
DevDescription: Deals damage, 30% chance of inflicting Burn.

Name: Wither Away
DevDescription: Deals damage, and then inflicts Panic on both players.

Name: Osteoporosis
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Rock Pull
DevDescription: If the opponent is attempting to switch out, deals heavy damage. Otherwise, deals damage to self.

Name: Pound Ground
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Blow
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Throw Pebble
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Unbounded Strike
DevDescription: Consume 3 Baselight stacks to deal 130 damage at 1 stamina cost. Otherwise, deals 80 damage at 2 stamina cost.

Name: Loop
DevDescription: Sets all stats to +15/30/40% based on Baselight level. Does not stack.

Name: Brightback
DevDescription: Deals damage. Consume 1 Baselight stack to heal for 50% of damage dealt.

Name: Renormalize
DevDescription: Sets Baselight level to 3. Clears all stat boosts, positive or negative.

Name: Chain Expansion
DevDescription: Sets up battlefield effect. Triggers on switch ins. Damages opponent and heals self for 16.6% of max HP. Has 4 charges.

Name: Initialize
DevDescription: Boosts ATK/SpATK by 50%. Can only be used once each time Inutia is sent out. When Inutia switches out, the bonus is transferred to the next incoming mon.

Name: Big Bite
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Hit And Dip
DevDescription: Deals damage, then swaps out.

Name: Triple Think
DevDescription: Boosts SpATK by 75%.

Name: Federal Investigation
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Negative Thoughts
DevDescription: Deals damage, 10% chance to cause Panic.

Name: Infinite Love
DevDescription: Deals damage, 10% chance to cause Sleep.

Name: Chill Out
DevDescription: Inflicts Frostbite on the opponent.

Name: Deadlift
DevDescription: Increases ATK and DEF by 50%.

Name: Deep Freeze
DevDescription: If the target has Frostbite, consumes Frostbite and does double damage.

Name: Pistol Squat
DevDescription: Deals damage, forces enemy mon to switch.

Name: Gachachacha
DevDescription: Uniformly random power from 0 to 200. 5% chance to auto-KO self, 5% chance to auto-KO opponent.

Name: Guest Feature
DevDescription: Attack Type is set to be the first Type of another selected party member.

Name: Unexpected Carrot
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Snack Break
DevDescription: Heal for 50% of health. Effectiveness reduces by half each time, until a min of 6.6%.

Name: Electrocute
DevDescription: Deals damage, 10% chance to cause Zap. A Zapped mon skips its next turn.

Name: Round Trip
DevDescription: Deals damage, then switches out.

Name: Mega Star Blast
DevDescription: If used during Overclock, clears Overclock and accuracy is 100%. Otherwise accuracy is 60%. Deals damage, 30% chance to inflict Zap.

Name: Dual Shock
DevDescription: Deals damage and inflicts Zap on self. Overclocks your team

Name: Honey Bribe
DevDescription: Heals both self and opponent by 50% of max HP. (Each subsequent use cuts HP healed in half). Lowers opponent SpDEF by 50%.

Name: Set Ablaze
DevDescription: Deals damage, 30% chance of Burn.

Name: Heat Beacon
DevDescription: +1 priority to next turn's move. Inflicts Burn.

Name: Q5
DevDescription: Deals damage in 5 turns and Burns the enemy.

Name: Volatile Punch
DevDescription: Deals damage. 25% chance of Burn and 25% chance of Frostbite.

Name: Gilded Recovery
DevDescription: Heals a target friendly mon from a status condition. If successful, Aurox heals 50% of max HP, and the target mon gains +1 stamina.

Name: Iron Wall
DevDescription: Until Aurox switches out, regenerate 50% of all damage taken. When activated for the first time each switch-in, Aurox gains 25% of max HP

Name: Bull Rush
DevDescription: Deals damage. Also deals 20% of max HP to self.

Name: Contagious Slumber
DevDescription: Inflicts Sleep on self and opponent.

Name: Vital Siphon
DevDescription: Deals damage, 50% chance to steal 1 stamina from opponent.

Name: Somniphobia
DevDescription: For the next 8 turns, any mon that rests will take 1/8th of max HP as damage.

Name: Night Terrors
DevDescription: Gain a Terror stack. Deals damage and costs stamina at end of turn for each Terror stack. Deals extra damage if opponent is alseep.

Name: Bubble Bop
DevDescription: Hits twice. Each hit deals 50 base power.

Name: Sneak Attack
DevDescription: Hits any opponent mon (even non-active). Can only be used once per switch-in.

Name: Nine Nine Nine
DevDescription: Sets crit rate to 90% on the next turn for all moves.

Name: Overflow
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Hard Reset
DevDescription: The next time your team rests, the resting mon gains +1 stamina, heals 12.5% max HP, and is swapped out. The next time your opponent rests, their mon loses 1 stamina, takes 12.5% max HP damage, and also swaps out.

Name: Scary Numbers
DevDescription: Deals damage

Name: Chronoffense
DevDescription: First use boosts defenses. Second use deals damage based on how much time has passed, and then resets.

Name: Modal Bolt
DevDescription: Choose between Fire, Ice, or Lightning each use. Each mode is usable once, and applies its corresponding status (Burn / Frostbite / Zap) at 33% chance.
